form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a fast early split and led throughout to score when a 7 length winner (17.44) over 305m at this track. In form and is right in the mix again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Charged out of the boxes with a fast early split and led throughout to score when a 7 length winner (17.44) over 305m at this track. In form and is right in the mix again.

form.formComment: Talented type with an excellent strike rate at this journey. Has been prominent in the run and duly saluted at her last couple, most recently over 400m at this track in a handy 22.80 beating Major Queen. Has run very fast time at this course and distance. Go close on her best form.

form.formComment: Finished in the minors last time when second (22.94) at this track, making it two placings on end. Will need a little luck early from the draw. Looks to have the job ahead.

form.formComment: Well supported last time and ran up to expectations, burning early to score a 1.5 lengths win at this track over 400m in 23.20. Capable of a good showing.
